title: Plushie Pods
description: Decorate your builds with 100+ collectable super cute Plushies!
body:
# Plushie Pods
## How to get Plushies? Craft Plushie Pods with Emeralds and Wool or Diamonds and Wool. (Any wool, any shape) ![Image showing how to craft emerald plushie pod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac8cfa3d448498cab015545e82d9b03102a024dd.png) ![how to craft diamond plushie pod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77cee937724a29bae1adad0c1b59451d3c8ddcd9.png) Right Click a Plushie Pod to open it. It will contain a random Plushie. Diamond Plushie Pods have a higher Chance of containing rare Plushies. There are currently 108 Plushies in total. ![Plushie Spread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a118cf971f7fd5d4141f1e7efe2f6ec440a2312a.png) ## The Rarity System The rarity system uses the Minecraft rarities! - Common: white - Uncommon: yellow - Rare: cyan - Epic: purple ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚙️ Compatibility An Internet Connection is required for the Textures to be loaded. Do not use an "Unlock all achievements" datapack after having installed this datapack! ## 🤝 Special Thanks, Attributions I did not make the Art in this pack myself, the custom Blocks are all Player heads that already exist inside of Minecraft. Thanks to all the Creators and Contributors on minecraft-heads.com, who made this Data Pack possible! ## ❗Issues and Suggestions Please report issues on [My Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H) or on GitHub.
